results.text: Blinding Blizzard: Movement halved. Test Fortitude DR12 every hour or take d4 cold damage.
Reshaping Landscape: Glaciers shift. Test Wits DR12 to find a shortcut or hidden cave.
Howling Winds: Guile Tests disadvantage. Attacks suffer -2 penalty.
Frozen Fog: Test Fortitude DR12 or take d4 damage and half movement.
Dance of Ice: Glittering ice crystals fall. Oddly calm.
Fimbulwinter's Breath: Fortitude Tests disadvantage today. Failure = d4 cold damage.
Frozen Corpse: Giant-sized weapon or Trinkets. Test Fortitude DR12 to loot.
Ancient Giant's Relic: Weapon, Item, or Rune. Jotnar will notice!
Abandoned Frost Drake Nest: Broken shells and one unhatched egg.
Cracked Ice Bridge: Test Wits DR12 to cross safely. Halfway, Test Swift DR14 or fall.
Mysterious Cave: Giant's hoard guarded by an ice trap (d6 damage).
Frozen Waterfall: Chamber with Trinkets, Runes, and a legendary weapon.
"Thrym's building an army to break the sky."
"Something old is waking beneath the frozen peaks."
"Geirrod's laying traps even the gods might fall for."
"The Frost Drakes are hunting giants now."
"The Rime Etins are ready to overthrow Thrym."
"The glaciers are moving... Ragnarok is close."
